## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`

## Review Checklist

- [ ] The change follows the Engineering Playbook.
- [ ] Public contracts are versioned intentionally.
- [ ] Domain logic remains independent from infrastructure.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when required.
- [ ] Breaking changes are called out clearly.
